datasets_used: CMS HCRIS HOSP10 FY2023 (Worksheet G-3, S-3 Part 1)
CMS NHE 2024 final tables (private-insurance hospital category)

gotchas_confirmed.hcris_net_patient_revenue: Worksheet G-3 Line 00300 Col 00100 (Net Patient Revenue, post-contractuals)
gotchas_confirmed.hcris_beds_worksheet: S-3 Part 1 Line 01400 Col 00200 (Total beds available)
gotchas_confirmed.hcris_payer_days_worksheet: S-3 Part 1 Line 01400 payer-day columns extracted for sanity-check, NOT used as allocation key (column encoding is brittle across HOSP10 vintages; the days-based commercial-share proxy yielded $0 commercial revenue in FY2023, confirming the encoding instability)
gotchas_confirmed.hcris_commercial_share_allocation: Uniform commercial-revenue share of 0.40 applied to Net Patient Revenue, with national total reconciled to NHE 2024 private-insurance hospital anchor ($595B) via small scale factor (~1.07). Stage 5.5 red-team should flag this as a methodology candidate for refinement when AHA or APCD data is available.
gotchas_confirmed.pos_ownership_codes: GNRL_CNTL_TYPE_CD categorical (01-13 per CMS data dictionary)
gotchas_confirmed.pos_chow_fields: CHOW_DT (date), CHOW_PRIOR_DT (prior), CHOW_CNT (count); changes flag ownership transitions

originality_posture: Headline computed from CMS POS + HCRIS + NHE applied to merger event panel; coefficient curated from Cooper/Dafny/Brot-Goldberg with piecewise application based on post-merger HHI level and shift magnitude.
